findings.description: Hidden digital signature metadata from the PDF is rendered as visible body text in the HTML, disrupting the document's natural reading flow.
findings.evidence: In the PDF on page 1, the 'Subject' line immediately follows the 'From' block. In the HTML, a large block of text starting with 'Digitally signed by Elizabeth S Werner...' is injected between them.

findings.description: A decorative footer graphic is significantly misrendered, creating a massive disruptive block in the HTML.
findings.evidence: The thin blue decorative line at the bottom of PDF page 1 is rendered at the top of HTML page 2 as a very thick, prominent green and blue rectangle that takes up significant vertical space.

findings.description: Underline formatting is lost on bolded list item headings.
findings.evidence: In the PDF, list headings such as 'Excavation' and 'Groundwater Assessments' are styled with both bold and underline. In the HTML, the underline is missing.
